steps.t: Haerandel says the herbalists are mistaken about the connexion between the purple Anorloth and the Anarlossë of legend, and wants you to tell them.
Haerandel is at the Festival Grounds, having told you his memories of the legendary blooms of Anarlossë that once grew where the Men of the West came …
Faregild Puddifoot, a hobbit visiting the Festival Grounds, has tried to get your attention.
Haerandel is at the Festival Grounds.
